overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character running through a snowy mountain forest at dusk. The character follows a winding trail through snow-covered pine trees and rocky terrain, transitioning from dense woodland to more open areas with distant mountains visible.

events.description: camera passes through low-hanging tree branches that temporarily obscure the view

agents.ego_description: running steadily along a narrow snow-covered trail through dense pine forest

entered.detail: tall snow-covered pine trees lining the left side of the trail
tall snow-covered pine trees lining the right side of the trail
snow-covered forest floor with visible trail path
snow-capped mountains visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a dense, snow-covered pine forest at dusk. The trail is narrow and winding, flanked by tall trees on both sides. At around 5 seconds, the camera passes through some low branches causing a brief occlusion. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, with snow visible on all surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain meadow with scattered trees

events.description: exits dense forest into more open terrain with wider visibility
begins ascending a steeper rocky hillside

agents.ego_description: running through open snowy terrain, navigating around bushes and rocks while heading uphill

entered.detail: low snow-covered bushes and shrubs flanking the path
rocky outcrops and boulders on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense forest into a more open snowy area with scattered trees and better visibility of the sky. The terrain becomes rockier and the path leads uphill. Snow-covered bushes line the trail, and distant mountains remain visible on the left as the character continues running through the winter landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching dense forest line on snowy hillside

events.description: approaching a denser tree line ahead while continuing uphill

agents.ego_description: running uphill toward a dense line of pine trees on the horizon

entered.detail: thick wall of pine trees forming the forest edge ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues running uphill through the snow, approaching a dense wall of pine trees in the distance. The terrain is rocky and uneven, with scattered trees on the sides. The sky remains overcast and gray, maintaining the cold winter atmosphere as the character heads toward the forest edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, snowy pine forest that gradually opens into a rocky uphill landscape. It begins with the character running along a narrow, winding trail flanked by tall trees under dim, atmospheric dusk lighting, briefly passing through low-hanging branches. As the character emerges from the thick woodland, the scene expands into a more open snowy area with scattered trees and a clearer view of the overcast sky. The terrain then shifts to a rockier, uneven incline lined with snow-covered bushes, with distant mountains visible to the left. Finally, the camera continues its ascent through the winter landscape, heading toward a dense wall of pine trees at the forest edge under a cold, gray sky.
